summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Cricket Exchange upgrade with all 10 market sections. All features working correctly. Football page verified NOT broken.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cricket Exchange fully upgraded with all 10 market sections. Football page unchanged and working. Both pages mobile responsive.

cricket_exchange.page_load: PASS - Page loads with RCB vs SRH match
cricket_exchange.match_info: PASS - LIVE indicator, score (51/2), CRR, current over balls displayed

market_sections.1_match_odds: PASS - Back/Lay columns (blue/pink), 3 odds each side
market_sections.4_session_markets: PASS - 6/10/15/20 over runs with exact format 'X over runs TEAM(RCB vs SRH)adv'
market_sections.6_fall_of_wickets: PASS - Fall of 1st wkt, 1st 2 wkt runs
market_sections.7_next_over_runs: PASS - Over X Total Runs, Next Over Boundaries
market_sections.10_special_markets: PASS - Batsman 50/100 for F du Plessis and G Maxwell

cricket_exchange.cashout_buttons: PASS - 9 Cashout buttons visible on market headers
cricket_exchange.auto_suspend: PASS - 'SUSPENDED' status shows during ball delivery, 'BALL IN PLAY - SUSPENDED' message, all odds show '-'
cricket_exchange.session_format: PASS - Exact format verified: '6 over runs RCB(RCB vs SRH)adv' with No/Yes columns
cricket_exchange.mobile_responsive: PASS - All markets visible, bottom nav works, bet slip modal opens

football_live.match_selector: PASS - 3 matches (Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga)
football_live.match_info: PASS - LIVE indicator, score, minute displayed
football_live.odds_click: PASS - Selection added to bet slip
football_live.mobile_responsive: PASS - All markets visible, bottom nav works

mocked_apis.details: Cricket match simulation on frontend (ball outcomes, score updates). Football match simulation on frontend (minute updates, odds fluctuation). No backend API calls for match data.
